# Lisa T. Miller

> Lisa T. Miller is an AI in healthcare strategist with more than 30 years inside hospital operations. She founded VIE Healthcare Consulting in 1999, generated over $1 billion in documented savings, holds two U.S. patents, and now guides health systems through practical AI adoption. She helps healthcare organizations use AI to fix revenue leaks, automate workflows, and return capacity to their people.

## Articles
- [What AI Can Actually Do for the Revenue Cycle](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/what-ai-can-do-for-revenue-cycle/)
- [Deciding Where AI Fits, a CFO's Guide](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/deciding-where-ai-fits-cfo-guide/)

- [The Work Nobody Went Into Healthcare to Do](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/work-nobody-went-into-healthcare-to-do/)
- [Your Best People Carry Your Most Broken Processes](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/your-best-people-carry-broken-processes/)
- [Everyone Is Selling Intelligence. Nobody Has Read Your Operations.](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/everyone-is-selling-intelligence/)

## Key Topics
- AI in healthcare: clinical documentation, chart review, risk stratification, patient access, revenue cycle
- AI for the business of healthcare: capacity forecasting, service line profitability, CFO/COO operations support
- Work-first AI adoption: map the workflow, baseline it, match proven capability, prove in 90 days
- Revenue cycle: denial prevention, eligibility verification, claim scrubbing, appeals automation
- Capacity returned, not headcount removed

## About Lisa T. Miller
- More than 30 years inside hospital operations
- Founded VIE Healthcare Consulting in 1999
- Over $1 billion in documented savings
- Two U.S. patents (Invoice Analytics System, Direct-To-Business Feedback Communication)
- VIE Healthcare sold to Morgan Stanley Capital Partners in 2022
- Based in Palm Beach Gardens, FL
- Phone: 786-214-9024

- [State of AI for Small Business](https://stateofaiforsmallbusiness.com) - Content hub and AI Opportunity Atlas
